title: Silent Analogue Wall Clock Battery Operated, Colourful Non-Ticking Round for Bedroom/Living Room/Kitchen/Office (Colorful, 12inch)
features: 🌈【Enjoy the Silence】Experience tranquility with our premium quartz sweep movement that operates in complete silence. Unlike traditional ticking clocks, this silent wall clock ensures absolutely noise-free performance, creating a peaceful environment ideal for bedrooms, offices, or any space requiring undisturbed focus

🌈【Crystal-Clear Visibility】Featuring 4K HD tempered glass with anti-dust sealed construction, the 12-inch (30cm) dial showcases easy-to-read numerals. High-contrast digits pop against a rainbow background, with reinforced edges preventing dust ingress. It is readable from any angle – perfect for functional timekeeping & vibrant decor

🌈【Hassle-Free Installation】Engineered with an integrated rear mounting slot and pre-installed durable hooks. Simply press the clock against the wall – no tools or drilling required. The innovative design prevents wall damage while guaranteeing a secure, wobble-free mount

🌈【Battery Operated】Powered by a single AA battery (not included), the energy-efficient quartz mechanism delivers exceptional accuracy with minimal power consumption. For optimal lifespan, we recommend standard carbon-zinc batteries over high-alkaline alternatives

🌈【Artistic Rainbow Accent Decor】Elevate your space with this analog wall clock featuring a natural wood-grain pattern and colorful rainbow finish. The modern aesthetic complements farmhouse, industrial, or minimalist themes, instantly brightening living rooms, kitchens, classrooms, or gyms while adding warm, inviting charm to any interior
